apps.name: Apollo
apps.subtitle: Apollo for Reddit with Apollo-Reborn
apps.localizedDescription:
Apollo-Reborn is the community-maintained Apollo sideload build powered by the Apollo-Reborn tweak.

It restores custom API support, media fixes, uploads, inline media, translation, saved categories, Liquid Glass support on iOS 26+, and the rest of the project's ongoing fixes and enhancements.

This source mirrors the GLASS Icons variant, which bundles the Liquid Glass alternate icon catalog without the iOS 26 UI runtime opt-in, so legacy UIKit behaviors such as the bottom tab bar swipe gesture are preserved.

This source is intended for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Apollo-Reborn is not compatible with AltStore PAL.

This project is not affiliated with Apollo or Christian Selig.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take photos to upload for sharing.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to save media or to select images to upload for sharing.
privacy.NSMotionUsageDescription: Detect rotations in Media Viewer and offer corresponding options.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Checked once to calculate sunset/sunrise times for the location.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Unlock Apollo when re-opening in order to prevent unauthorized access.

versions.localizedDescription:
Upstream asset: "Apollo-Reborn-3.2.0-GLASS.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
> [!NOTE]
> Stay tuned for our next upcoming release, bringing  *even more* new features like signing in without API keys, Picture-in-Picture (PiP), build your own theme, Img Chest image uploads, Apple on-device translations, redesigned subreddit sidebar, community highlights, and more!

Features

- New Apollo Reborn Widgets — nine Home Screen, Lock Screen, and StandBy widgets (Showerthoughts, Jokes, Post, Feed, Photo, Shortcuts, Apollo Actions, Calendar, and Headline) (#406: @jordanearle)
  - To configure widgets: copy the one-time setup code from Settings > Apollo Reborn > Copy Widget Setup Code. Then, long-press any widget → Edit Widget → paste into Setup Code.
  - Requires iOS 17 or later. Widgets do not work on iOS 26 if sideloading with Sideloadly - please use an alternative instead. The "NOEXTENSIONS" IPA variant does not include widgets.

    
    

- Add a Universal OAuth Sign-In toggle in Settings > Apollo Reborn (on by default) to fall back to Apollo's native sign-in if the in-app login causes trouble (#432: @JeffreyCA)
  - All IPAs released from now on have "dystopia" and "redreader" URL schemes already registered so no need to manually edit Info.plist anymore
- Add a manual sign-in fallback for older iOS versions that can't load Reddit's login page, using an external browser and an Apollo Reborn userscript to paste a sign-in code back into Apollo (#430: @DeltAndy123; sign-in keyboard improvements by @Alstruit)
- Add a Text Post Thumbnails toggle in Settings > Apollo Reborn > Media (on by default) — text posts that embed an image now show a thumbnail with a Text Post badge, and tapping it opens the image in the media viewer instead of the thread (#426: @icpryde)
- Add Hide Mod Subreddits to remove moderated subreddits you can't leave from the Subreddits list — tap Edit, then the blue button to hide a subreddit and the green button to bring it back (#424: @icpryde)
- Show moderator reports as native inline sections in the post and comment action menu (#412: @JeffreyCA)
- Make the banned-profile overlay dismissable (#409: @JeffreyCA)
- Combine cache-clearing options into one Clear Tweak Caches button under a renamed Data section (#409: @JeffreyCA)

Fixes

- Show the author avatar and subreddit icon in Share as Image post exports, so the image matches what you see in the app (#438: @icpryde)
- Fix several link card glitches in feeds — cards whose text overflowed into the post below, Bluesky posts losing their paragraph breaks, compact cards stuck at full height, and blank image areas on links whose thumbnail isn't ready yet (#427: @icpryde)
- Fix gallery GIFs getting stuck on a loading spinner when swiping between items in an album (#404: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix comment and post text showing a literal "​" or an extra blank line at the end (#405: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix comment scrolling freezing in threads that contain a link to removed media, such as a deleted "v.redd.it" video (#395: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix spurious "error :(" overlay appearing over videos that play fine but whose preview image fails to load (#409: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix Live Activities not updating on secret-protected self-hosted notification backends (#411: @nickclyde)
- Fix an installation conflict when upgrading from some older versions (#401: @Alstruit)
- Bundle libFLEX inside the app so rootless jailbreak users can keep the standalone libFLEX package installed without it conflicting with Apollo Reborn (#437: @iCrazeiOS)

Upstream asset: "Apollo-Reborn-3.1.1-GLASS.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
> [!NOTE]
> We're aware of reports that Reddit has started revoking some users' API keys. Please see [our new updated instructions](https://github.com/Apollo-Reborn/Apollo-Reborn#dont-have-an-api-key) for workarounds.
>
> AltStore, SideStore, Feather sources can be found at https://apolloreborn.app/#download

- Fix a crash when sharing a post to Messages or Mail from the share sheet — the system compose controller was misidentified as an Apollo composer, leaving GIF-toolbar injection timers that dereferenced the dismissed share UI and crashed (#378: @nickclyde)
- Fix Reddit login on iOS 15 by automatically falling back to Old Reddit, and add an Old Reddit button to the auth view for users who need to switch manually (#377: @DeltAndy123)
- Fix video controls overlay rendering, including the AirPlay button getting clipped or misaligned (#383: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix flair alignment so post and user flairs no longer sit too low or clip their text (#389: @JeffreyCA)
- Fix Color Flairs reverting to grey or the wrong shade after returning to Apollo from the background (#391: @icpryde)

apps.name: Plezy
apps.subtitle: A Plex and Jellyfin client
apps.localizedDescription: A modern cross-platform Plex and Jellyfin client.

versions.localizedDescription:
Upstream asset: "plezy-ios.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
Fixed

* Timeline focus sink
* Jellyfin Specials order

Full Changelog: https://github.com/edde746/plezy/compare/2.7.0...

Upstream asset: "plezy-ios.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
Added

- Continue Watching behavior setting
- Plex Plays/User Rating sorts

Improved

- Watch state consistency
- Home hub previews
- Jellyfin recency ordering
- TV keyboard search focus
- Episode switching performance

Fixed

- Mobile chapters & queue
- Rare Apple Dolby Vision decoding issue
- Recently Added scoping
- Server tasks via remote
- Next unwatched selection
- Redundant mark-watched updates
- Image placeholder sizing
- TV grid sizing
- tvOS Continue Watching autoplay missing start
- tvOS Top Shelf sync
- More untranslated strings

Full Changelog: https://github.com/edde746/plezy/compare/2.5.0...2.6.0

Upstream asset: "plezy-ios.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
Added

- Jellyfin extras support
- Jellyfin metadata editing
- Video and audio quality labels
- tvOS Top Shelf support
- New app menus
- Mobile settings shortcut in the home menu
- Mobile library browse options sheet
- A startup section setting
- Faster loading for large show detail pages

Improved

- More consistent back navigation
- Better TV and dpad focus behavior
- Better access to app bar actions on TV
- More UI text is localized

Fixed

- Jellyfin artwork uploads
- Jellyfin default track selection
- Subtitle search when no subtitle tracks exist (#1219)
- ExoPlayer transcode seek positions
- Player chrome overlay stability
- Play-next looping at end of file
- iOS video zoom and stretch fit
- iOS anamorphic video aspect ratio
- iOS frozen video after Control Center
- Profile 8 Dolby Vision decoding
- tvOS remote playback controls
- tvOS HDR toggle behavior
- Live TV time-shift skip overshoot
- Watch Together recent room actions on dpad

privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses the local network to control to media servers and players.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to scan QR codes for Companion Remote pairing.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This app needs to connect to your media servers on your local network.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Plezy uses location access when iOS requires it to detect your local network and connect to your media servers.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Plezy needs photo library access so you can choose images to upload as media artwork.
privacy.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Allow notifications from friends, recommendations, your media server and more.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Your data will be used to deliver the most relevant ads when watching free movies and shows.

apps.versionDescription:
Upstream asset: "plezy-ios.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
Fixed

* Timeline focus sink
* Jellyfin Specials order

Full Changelog: https://github.com/edde746/plezy/compare/2.7.0...

apps.name: Twitch
apps.subtitle: Twitch with TwitchAdBlock
apps.localizedDescription:
Twitch with the unofficial TwitchAdBlock tweak for sideloading.

It blocks live-stream and VOD ads, removes feed promotions and ad-network requests, supports authenticated and fallback proxies, renders 7TV, BetterTTV, and FrankerFaceZ emotes in chat, and adds app customization options.

This source mirrors the patched Twitch IPA published by gunnerkidBT's TwitchAdBlock fork. The fork maintains compatibility with newer Twitch and iOS versions and is not affiliated with Twitch Interactive.

versions.localizedDescription:
Upstream asset: "tv.twitch-29.9-TwitchAdBlock-0.1.12.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
TwitchMods v0.1.12 — for Twitch iOS 29.9

What's new
- The Live tab keeps playing — no more getting kicked to Watch/Follow after a while.
- Hid the "Go Ad-Free" button (the Turbo upsell) on the Following tab.
- Blocks a few more ads — streamer-read sponsor spots.
- Reload Emotes button — refresh 7TV/BTTV/FFZ emotes without restarting the app.
- Back up & restore your settings — export to a file and import it back later.
- Diagnostics screen — a quick green/red check that the mod still works on your Twitch version.
- Easier-to-read settings — a short description under each option, grouped under clear headings.

Downloads
- "tv.twitch-29.9-TwitchAdBlock-0.1.12.ipa" — full app.
- "tv.twitch-29.9-TwitchAdBlock-0.1.12-noplugins.ipa" — app extensions removed so a free Apple ID only uses 1 App ID slot when sideloading.

Install with AltStore / SideStore (drag in the IPA) or TrollStore (tap +, pick the IPA).

Full plain-language changelog: ["CHANGELOG.md"](https://github.com/gunnerkidBT/TwitchAdBlock/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)

Upstream asset: "tv.twitch-29.9-TwitchAdBlock-0.1.11.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
Twitch iOS 29.9 compatibility build of TwitchAdBlock v0.1.11.

No mod changes — the tweak source and compiled "TwitchAdBlock.dylib" are byte-identical to [v29.8-0.1.11](https://github.com/gunnerkidBT/TwitchAdBlock/releases/tag/v29.8-0.1.11). Only the host app was updated from 29.8 to 29.9 and the same dylib re-injected. All hooked classes were verified to still resolve in the 29.9 binary.

Downloads
- "tv.twitch-29.9-TwitchAdBlock-0.1.11.ipa" — full build (includes all 5 of Twitch's app extensions).
- "tv.twitch-29.9-TwitchAdBlock-0.1.11-noplugins.ipa" — plugin-free build. The 5 app extensions (GameBroadcasting, NotificationService, Share Extension, TwitchEmotes, TwitchWidgets) are stripped out. Recommended for free Apple ID accounts, which are limited to 10 App IDs per 7 days: the full build registers 6 App IDs (main app + 5 extensions), while this build registers only 1. Core stream-watching, chat, custom emotes, and ad-blocking are unaffected; you lose home-screen widgets, screen broadcasting, the "Share to Twitch" share-sheet action, the iMessage emote stickers, and rich (image) push notifications — basic push notifications still work.

Install
Download an IPA and install via AltStore / SideStore (drag in to sign) or TrollStore ("+" → select IPA).

Upstream asset: "tv.twitch-29.8-TwitchAdBlock-0.1.11.ipa"

Upstream Release Notes
Twitch iOS 29.8 compatibility build of TwitchAdBlock v0.1.11.

No tweak source changes from [v0.1.11](https://github.com/gunnerkidBT/TwitchAdBlock/releases/tag/v0.1.11) — the compiled "TwitchAdBlock.dylib" is byte-identical; only the host IPA was updated from 29.4.2 to 29.8 and the dylib re-injected.

Install
Download "tv.twitch-29.8-TwitchAdBlock-0.1.11.ipa" and install via AltStore / SideStore (drag in to sign) or TrollStore ("+" → select IPA).

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Twitch needs permission to access the camera on this device to stream live video and change your profile image.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Twitch uses the local network to discover Cast-enabled devices on your WiFi network.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Twitch needs permission to access the microphone on this device to stream live video.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Twitch needs permission to write to your photo library in order to save images.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Your iOS advertising ID and device data will be used to support creators and provide a personal ad experience.
